concerns.text: Task T044 is marked as incomplete (checkbox unchecked) and explicitly flagged in the Analyze report as missing the required implementation of the motion/p-value sweep logic and the `reports/sensitivity_analysis.md` artifact. This leaves FR-010 (Sensitivity Analysis) and SC-006 (Threshold Sensitivity) without a completed task to satisfy them.

Task T001a (Identify and verify a valid OpenNeuro dataset ID) is marked as incomplete (checkbox unchecked). The Analyze report identifies this as a 'CRITICAL' blocker because FR-001, FR-011, and SC-001 cannot be implemented or tested without a verified dataset ID in `data/verified_sources.json`. The pipeline is unexecutable until this task is completed.

Task T032 describes a sensitivity analysis sweep over p-values `{, 0.1}` (missing 0.05) and a vague motion range. This does not fully cover the specific thresholds mandated by SC-006 (`{, 0.05, 0.1}`) and FR-010. While the task exists, its description is insufficient to guarantee the success criterion is met without further clarification or expansion.
